title: RevitSettings
description: RevitSettings: General settings that are applicable to all actions performed by the instance of Revit adapter.

ConnectionSettings.description: Socket connection settings (ports, timeout) for the adapter. ConnectionSettings: Socket connection settings for Revit Adapter.

FamilyLoadSettings.description: Revit family load settings for the adapter. FamilyLoadSettings: Revit family load settings for Revit Adapter. Prototype, currently with limited functionality.

MappingSettings.description: An entity holding information about the enforced convert relationships between Revit families and BHoM types on Pull as well as mapping between Revit parameters and BHoM object properties on Push/Pull. MappingSettings: An entity holding information about the enforced convert relationships between Revit families and BHoM types on Pull as well as mapping between Revit parameters and BHoM object properties on Push/Pull.

DistanceTolerance.description: Distance tolerance to be used in geometry processing. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

AngleTolerance.description: Angle tolerance to be used in geometry processing. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
